subject: Rumor: {rival} interested in {player}
body:
Transfer rumors are circulating that {rival} is interested in signing {player}. While it's just speculation for now, these rumors often have some truth behind them.

Thought you should know.

es.subject: Rumor: {rival} interesada en {player}
es.body:
Circulan rumores de traspaso que {rival} está interesada en fichar a {player}. Aunque por ahora son solo especulaciones, estos rumores suelen tener algo de verdad.

Creí que debía saberlo.
